Who is the director of 'Welcome to the Jungle'?

Filmmaker Ahmed Khan, who has helmed movies like 'Fool N Final' (2007), 'Baaghi 2' (2018), 'Baaghi 3' (2020), and 'Heropanti 2', has directed the third installment of 'Welcome' franchise, 'Welcome to the Jungle'

title: Deepika Chikhalia PRAISES Sai Pallavi for 'Ramayana'
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Deepika Chikhalia, who became a household name for her portrayal of Goddess Sita in Ramanand Sagar's iconic 1987 television series 'Ramayan', has thrown her weight behind the upcoming big-screen adaptation directed by Nitesh Tiwari. The veteran actress has expressed full confidence in Sai Pallavi an
content:
Original Sita Deepika Chikhalia endorses 'phenomenal' Sai Pallavi and Ranbir Kapoor for Nitesh Tiwari's 'Ramayana': 'Both will portray their characters very beautifully'

Deepika Chikhalia, who became a household name for her portrayal of Goddess Sita in Ramanand Sagar's iconic 1987 television series 'Ramayan', has thrown her weight behind the upcoming big-screen adaptation directed by Nitesh Tiwari. The veteran actress has expressed full confidence in Sai Pallavi and

Ranbir Kapoor

, who are set to play Sita and Lord Ram respectively in the much-anticipated film.

Deepika Chikhalia backs Sai Pallavi and Ranbir Kapoor

Speaking to IANS while promoting her upcoming film 'Tera Mera Nata', Deepika Chikhalia praised both lead actors warmly. She said, "Both are very good actors. I have seen Sai Pallavi's work and she is a phenomenal actress. Ranbir Kapoor is also an excellent actor. I am sure both of them will portray their characters very beautifully."

Deepika Chikhalia on the timeless appeal of 'Ramayan'

Deepika Chikhalia also reflected on why the epic continues to resonate across generations.

She shared, "It is my good fortune that I got the opportunity to portray such a character. People have given me immense love and acceptance. Ramayan is a story that can be retold in every era in a new way. It has been made before and it will continue to be made because its foundation rests on faith and values."

Deepika Chikhalia on people touching her feet decades later

The actress opened up about a deeply personal experience, people continuing to bow before her out of reverence for the character she played. She said, "Initially, it was difficult for me to understand why people would touch my feet. But later I realised that they were not expressing reverence for Deepika; they were expressing their devotion towards Sita Mata. I respect their emotions. It is their love and faith."

More about 'Ramayana'

Directed by Nitesh Tiwari, the film stars Ranbir Kapoor, Sai Pallavi, Yash, Sunny Deol, and Ravie Dubey in the lead roles. The first part of the epic saga is set to arrive in cinemas during Diwali this year.

title: Madhavan hails Ajith Kumar Racing's historic debut at Le Mans Cup
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Actor Ajith Kumar and his team created history by competing in the prestigious Le Mans Cup in France, and actor RMadhavan has come out in support of the actor-racer. Ajith Kumar Racing participated in the endurance race held at Le Mans on June 12, marking another big milestone in Ajith’s growing mot
content:
Actor Ajith Kumar and his team created history by competing in the prestigious Le Mans Cup in France, and actor RMadhavan has come out in support of the actor-racer. Ajith Kumar Racing participated in the endurance race held at Le Mans on June 12, marking another big milestone in Ajith’s growing motorsport journey. Fans and celebs alike celebrated the achievement, with many praising the actor’s commitment to juggling both cinema and professional racing on an international level.

R Madhavan praises Ajith's achievement with a heartfelt social media post

R Madhavan took to Instagram stories to praise Ajith Kumar Racing's performance. He shared a news report of the team’s historic entry at Le Mans, using Indian tricolour and salute emojis to express his admiration. It was a small gesture that showed his respect for what Ajith had achieved on the world stage of racing. Fans soon caught the post, thanking Madhavan for backing a fellow actor who continues to wave the Indian flag in one of the world’s toughest motorsport tournaments.

Ajith Kumar Racing continues its international campaign

The Le Mans Cup is a six-round racing championship that has travelled to Barcelona, before heading to Le Castellet and Le Mans in France. The remaining rounds will be held in Belgium, the United Kingdom, and Portugal. The racing team is led by Narain Karthikeyan, a former Formula One driver, along with Aditya Patel, Romain Vozniak, and Ajith Kumar. Ajith continues to chase his love for motorsports, while Madhavan is also having a memorable time in his career after he was recently bestowed with the prestigious Padma Shri at an investiture ceremony in New Delhi.

title: 'Raakh' actor Akash Makhija reveals he once lost lead role in Rajshri film
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Akash Makhija may currently be grabbing headlines for his chilling portrayal of Babu in the crime thriller 'Raakh', but the actor says his journey to recognition has been filled with heartbreak, rejection and constant struggle. While audiences are applauding him for playing one of the most hated cha
content:
'Raakh' actor Akash Makhija reveals he once lost lead role in Rajshri film with just a text message: 'Went to the washroom and cried'

Akash Makhija may currently be grabbing headlines for his chilling portrayal of Babu in the crime thriller 'Raakh', but the actor says his journey to recognition has been filled with heartbreak, rejection and constant struggle.

While audiences are applauding him for playing one of the most hated characters on screen, Makhija revealed that there was a time when he was replaced from a Rajshri film at the last moment, leaving him devastated.In a conversation with Mid-Day, the actor opened up about the setbacks that shaped his career, his early days of chasing auditions across Mumbai and why success in the entertainment industry never comes easy.

From a McDonald's washroom to playing Babu in 'Raakh'

Akash shared that acting had fascinated him since childhood. One of his favourite characters growing up was Baburao Ganpatrao Apte from 'Hera Pheri', played by Paresh Rawal. Looking back now, he finds it amusing that his breakthrough role in 'Raakh' is also a character named Babu.Recalling his struggling days, the actor said he travelled from Ulhasnagar to Mumbai almost every day for auditions, surviving on limited pocket money while trying to build a career.

"I used to get a student railway pass for a fifty per cent concession. I would go to McDonald's outside Andheri Station to groom myself inside the washroom. For the longest time, it was my vanity."Before landing substantial acting roles, Akash worked in more than 100 commercials and accepted every opportunity that came his way, hoping one project would change his fortunes.

Losing a Rajshri film left him in tears

Although Akash has now earned praise for performances in projects like 'Nirmal Pathak Ki Ghar Wapsi', 'Gram Chikitsalay' and 'Raakh', he revealed that the road to success included painful disappointments.The actor disclosed that he was once selected to play one of the lead roles in a Rajshri production but lost the project without any warning."I was cast for a Rajshri film as one of the leads. One day, I was doing an ad shoot, and I got a text, not even a call, that they were releasing me." The sudden decision left him emotionally shattered."This field is brutal. I was on a different set when this happened, and the director told me to say my line.

I asked for a five-minute break, went to the washroom, and cried."He further revealed that rejection came in different forms during his career. "There was also a time I was not cast for a show because of my horoscope."

'Raakh' became the breakthrough he almost didn't get

Interestingly, Akash wasn't the original choice to play Babu in 'Raakh'. Nearly 800 actors auditioned for the role, and although he was initially rejected, fate eventually worked in his favour.According to the actor, another performer had already been finalised before the makers unexpectedly brought him on board a week later.

Having experienced similar setbacks himself, Makhija said he empathises with actors who lose projects after being locked.Today, his terrifying portrayal of Babu has become one of the most talked-about aspects of 'Raakh'. The actor joked that viewers have started calling him "the most hated man on the internet," with many even comparing his performance to Joffrey Baratheon from 'Game of Thrones'.Also starring Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Ramandeep Yadav, Aamir Bashir and Rakesh Bedi, 'Raakh' is currently streaming on Amazon Prime Video.

title: Here's how suspended editor Pradeep Raghav joined 'Dharman'
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: In a major development, film editor Pradeep E. Raghav has officially joined the technical crew of superstar Rajinikanth’s highly anticipated 173rd film, officially titled 'Dharman.' This high-profile gig marks a swift professional comeback for Raghav, who was suspended just two months prior by the S
content:
In a major development, film editor Pradeep E. Raghav has officially joined the technical crew of superstar Rajinikanth’s highly anticipated 173rd film, officially titled 'Dharman.

' This high-profile gig marks a swift professional comeback for Raghav, who was suspended just two months prior by the Southern India Film Editors Association (SIFEA) over negligence surrounding the massive pre-release piracy leak of Thalapathy Vijay’s final film, 'Jana Nayagan.'

An apology letter helps revoke Pradeep Raghav's suspension over the 'Jana Nayagan' controversy

The South Indian Film Editors Association had earlier suspended Pradeep Raghav for allegedly violating its bylaws during the making of 'Jana Nayagan.'

It is reported that he hired non-members as assistants for many of his projects, which violates their policy. The organization also added that, although he was not directly involved in the movie's online release, he admitted his negligence contributed to the problem.

In response, Pradeep Raghav apologized to the organization in writing, as reported by Dinamalar. After reviewing his explanation, the Executive Committee decided to revoke the suspension.

Association president Gopi later confirmed that the disciplinary action against him had been officially withdrawn.

'Jana Nayagan' leak sparked major action across the industry

The illegal leak of 'Jana Nayagan' before its CBFC certification became one of Tamil cinema's biggest piracy cases. The Tamil Nadu Cyber Crime Wing arrested several people, including a freelance editor identified as the key accused in the case. An interim order was passed to stop the circulation of the leaked video on social media, other online platforms, and cable television. Even though Pradeep Raghav was not implicated in the leak, the Editors’ Association took his lack of caution regarding the leak very seriously.

Rajinikanth's 'Dharman' marks a new chapter for Pradeep Raghav

With the ban lifted, Pradeep Raghav has now joined the technical crew of ‘Dharman’. The film starring Rajinikanth and produced by Kamal Haasan is one of the most awaited Tamil releases in the offing.

title: Reese Witherspoon confirms romance with Oliver Haarmann
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Reese Witherspoon has confirmed her relationship with Oliver Haarmann by making their first official public appearance as a couple. The actress attended the New York City premiere of Prime Video's 'Elle' which is a prequel to the beloved 'Legally Blonde' franchise alongside the financier marking a s
content:
The couple confirmed their relationship with their first official public appearance together, with sources saying Haarmann's support and distance from the Hollywood spotlight have made their bond especially meaningful to the actress.Image credit (Instagram)

Reese Witherspoon has confirmed her relationship with Oliver Haarmann by making their first official public appearance as a couple. The actress attended the New York City premiere of Prime Video's 'Elle' which is a prequel to the beloved 'Legally Blonde' franchise alongside the financier marking a significant milestone in their romance, which has been the subject of speculation for over a year.According to PEOPLE, Witherspoon and Haarmann have been romantically linked since 2024 though they kept their relationship relatively private until this recent public outing. At the premiere the couple displayed their affection openly; observers noted that they "smiled and held hands throughout the evening." Witherspoon wore a striking pink dress in homage to Elle Woods' signature colour while Haarmann complemented her look with a pink tie, marking a subtle but meaningful gesture of support.

Oliver Haarmann's career in finance

Oliver Haarmann has built a distinguished career in the financial sector establishing himself as a prominent figure in private equity and investment. He is a founding partner of Searchlight Capital a private equity firm with offices in New York, London, and Toronto that was established in 2010. Within the firm Haarmann serves on multiple committees and portfolio company boards leveraging his extensive experience in the investment industry.

Prior to co-founding Searchlight Capital Haarmann held a senior partnership position at a major international investment firm based in London where he developed the expertise and connections that would later contribute to his success as a founding partner. His education shows his dedication to solid academic preparation for his profession. Haarmann earned a bachelor's degree in history and international relations from Brown University and subsequently completed an MBA from Harvard Business School.

Financier and investor Oliver Haarmann has found himself in the public eye following the confirmation of his relationship with Reese Witherspoon, marking a rare moment of attention for someone known for staying away from the Hollywood spotlight.Image credit (Instagram)

Oliver Haarmann's ownership stake in the New York Islanders

Beyond his work in finance, Haarmann has realised a personal dream through his involvement with professional sports. In 2023 he acquired a minority stake in the New York Islanders hockey team fulfilling a lifelong ambition to be involved with the franchise. As a lifelong fan of hockey and the Islanders in particular his investment was more than a financial decision, it was a major personal accomplishment.Speaking about his ownership role during a 2025 interview Haarmann reflected on the symbolic importance of his involvement with the team.

"My 10-year-old self would never believe my seats," he said, emphasising how the achievement represented a realisation of childhood dreams and aspirations that had remained with him throughout his adult life.

Oliver Haarmann's previous marriage and family

Before his relationship with Reese Witherspoon, Haarmann was married to Mala Gaonkar, a fellow investor and businesswoman. The couple shares two sons and collaborated on meaningful philanthropic work during their time together.

Both Haarmann and Gaonkar served as co-founders of the Surgo Foundation, a nonprofit organisation established in partnership with public health expert Dr. Sema Sgaier and bestselling author Malcolm Gladwell.The Surgo Foundation operates with a mission described as being "committed to improving health and prosperity everywhere from global hubs to local communities," reflecting Haarmann's commitment to using his resources and platform to address significant social issues.

Reese Witherspoon and Oliver Haarmann's relationship timeline

Witherspoon and Haarmann's relationship became the subject of public interest beginning in July 2024, when they were first spotted together in public. At that initial sighting, sources close to Witherspoon suggested she was "taking things slow when it comes to dating" and indicated the two were simply friends at that stage.

The actress made headlines as her relationship with Oliver Haarmann entered the public spotlight, marking her first major romance since her 2023 separation.

However, by early September 2024, the nature of their connection had evolved into a romantic relationship.

Following another public sighting in New York City on September 5, reports emerged confirming that the two were romantically involved. Over the subsequent months, they were occasionally photographed together during outings in London and Saint-Tropez, France, suggesting they were gradually becoming more comfortable with public visibility as a couple.According to a source who spoke with the outlet about the progression of their relationship, Witherspoon has developed genuine feelings for Haarmann.

"Her relationship with Oliver is very special to her. He's not interested in the Hollywood spotlight. He's there for her," the insider said, emphasising that Haarmann's lack of interest in celebrity culture may actually be one of the qualities that appeals to the actress.Witherspoon's relationship with Haarmann represents her first significant romantic partnership since her 2023 separation from her previous husband, Hollywood agent Jim Toth. The couple had been married since 2011 and share a son, Tennessee. Before that marriage, Witherspoon was married to actor Ryan Phillippe, her co-star in 'Cruel Intentions', from 1999 until their separation in 2006.

title: Katy takes a dig at Orlando in 'Watch It Burn' video
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Katy Perry has unleashed her fiery new music video for 'Watch It Burn,' showcasing a dramatic shift to a darker persona. The visuals, packed with symbolic 'easter eggs' hinting at past relationships, depict her embracing anger and moving on from past hurts. This powerful release coincides with her b
content:
Katy Perry has unveiled the music video for her new single 'Watch It Burn', embracing her darker side.The video that dropped on Friday, sees the singer with a scorpion tail, as she goes on a fiery rampage, leaving her past in flames.

The new music video and song lyrics see the star embracing an edgy look, as compared to her past colourful and eccentric avatars.

Katy Perry releases 'Watch It Burn'

'Watch It Burn' Lyrics

In the chorus, Perry sings: "Tonight’s the night, I light a match / Throw it hard behind my back / Gonna try to forgive and forget / Light a cigarette, and watch it burn / With the past, I’ma breathe in the ash / Gonna try to forgive and forget / Light a cigarette, and watch it burn."

Katy Perry takes a dig at Orlando Bloom?

The music video also features plenty of 'easter eggs' linked to her past romances and relationships.

Fans were quick to spot a newsstand carrying publications titled Gaslight Magazine and Slop Times, which are set ablaze. Elsewhere, an antique store is named Time Will Tell, while television screens display the message "Breaking News: Don't Believe Everything You Hear" and a sign reading, "Read Between the Headlines.

" The visuals have been interpreted by fans as a diss to Perry's 10-year romance with Orlando Bloom.

About 'Watch It Burn'

According to the song's creative notes, Watch It Burn "explores the moment when years of restraint, people-pleasing and silence are finally replaced with honesty."Speaking to songwriter Justin Tranter on Unfamous The Podcast, Perry revealed that she wrote the song in March 2025 but initially hesitated to release it. "In ‘Watch It Burn’ I am wrestling with my darkness but last year was pretty tough. I have not given myself permission to be angry my whole life over things where I should be f–king angry about.

What I’ve done is I pushed it down, but I should be f–king angry. I’m allowed to be angry for a f–king moment," she continued.

Katy Perry and Justin Trudeau go public with romance

This fiery new video and music comes amid Perry's new romance with Justin Trudeau. The couple who began dating last year, is reportedly going strong. The two went public on the singer's birthday, which she celebrated in Paris. The two have since celebrated Christmas and the New Year together. They were also spotted making their red carpet debut at the world premiere of her concert film, 'Katy Perry: The Lifetimes Tour – Live from Paris'.

Katy and Justin were most recently spotted attending the World Cup opening together, where the singer performed her single 'Wonder' at the ceremony.

title: Gracie Abrams talks about her relationship with Paul Mescal
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Gracie Abrams opened up about her artistic partnership with Paul Mescal on the track 'Imaginary Friend,' expressing frustration at having to conceal their bond. Despite the looming public gaze, Abrams shared the bliss stemming from their collaboration, highlighting that personal fulfillment takes pr
content:
Gracie Abrams talks about working with Paul Mescal on 'Imaginary Friends'.

Gracie Abrams and Paul Mescal’s relationship has been quite the mystery since the past two years. While fans have been celebrating the couple since they first sparked rumors two years ago, the two of them have chosen to keep things as quiet as possible.

However, the famed singer is now opening up a little about their relationship and dynamics, as well as how she dislikes ‘hiding’. Here is what the singer shared.

Gracie Abrams gets candid about her relationship with Paul Mescal

Gracie Abrams recently featured on an episode of the ‘New York Times Popcast’, where she opened up about how she does not like to hide that much. Not only that, but the star also weighed in on what it was like to work with Mescal on her song ‘Imaginary Friend.’ The actress shared that the process felt natural to them; however, the song also invited a lot of scrutiny from the public as well.Weighing in on this, she commented that she likes privacy in balance, revealing, “I don't like the feeling of hiding. I also love privacy where it feels like the right thing.” She also opened up about how, as celebrities, their relationship will always be a topic of public debate, adding, “I always try to assume the absolute worst-case scenario of everything, and then anything else is pleasant.”As for her experience working with her longtime partner, the star shared all about how exciting the project was for them.

She shared, “That was so fun to write together. That wasn't some groundbreaking event for us. We have a very creative home with friends who are so good at what they do, and everyone feels happy to share that with one another.”Concluding her comments on the matter, the singer shared that as long as you are sure about your feelings, the outside noise will not matter at the end of the day. She finally mentioned that, “If you know how happy your experience was, making something or how much you learned about yourself or your partner or whatever the thing is, it's like, no amount of hate or trolling or whatever could take that away.”

Gracie Abrams and Paul Mescal have been dating for the past two years, after they were spotted together in London in 2024.

Gracie Abrams and Paul Mescal go red carpet official

While the two of them have been spotted together time and time again over the last few years, confirming that they are together, the couple only went red carpet official this year. The duo appeared at the 2026 BAFTAs red carpet hand in hand, posing for the paparazzi as they smiled at one another. Following this, they also attended the 2026 Golden Globes and Vanity Fair Oscar Party together as well. Abrams and Mescal were first seen in June 2024 in London on a date night, after which their relationship was confirmed.

They have already gone social media official and regularly share glimpses of their life with the world.

title: All about Akshay’s hilarious post-interval scene in 'Welcome 3'
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle' is making headlines not just for its comedy but for a genuinely inventive cinematic trick. The Ahmed Khan directorial features a surprise sequence placed immediately after the intermission slate, a concept rarely seen in Hindi cinema, and early audience reactio
content:
What happens right after the intermission in 'Welcome to the Jungle'? Inside Akshay Kumar’s hilarious, hidden post-interval scene

Akshay Kumar's 'Welcome to the Jungle' is making headlines not just for its comedy but for a genuinely inventive cinematic trick. The Ahmed Khan directorial features a surprise sequence placed immediately after the intermission slate, a concept rarely seen in Hindi cinema, and early audience reactions suggest it landed brilliantly.

What happens after the interval in 'Welcome to the Jungle'?

In a departure from convention, the word 'Intermission' appears on screen and is immediately followed by Akshay Kumar appearing with popcorn in hand, directly addressing the audience. In a hilarious moment, he explains that the makers had shot a portion for the film but didn't know where exactly to place it, so they decided to screen it after the interval slate. The sequence is then followed by the song 'Kyun', featuring Akshay Kumar and Disha Patani.

How did audiences react?

The response to the initiative has been enthusiastic. According to the Bollywood Hungama report, "It's an experiment which seems to have worked. The paid previews of the film took place yesterday, June 25, from 7:30 pm onwards, and the response to this initiative has been positive. It led to a lot of laughter. Many viewers, who had got up to rush to the washroom or grab snacks, immediately sat down on hearing Akshay Kumar's message.

They enjoyed the visuals of the song and then stepped out."

How did cinemas keep the surprise intact?

The experience was carefully orchestrated. The report added, "It seems like cinemas were also instructed by the distributors not to switch on the lights when the interval slate appears on screen and also while 'Kyun' plays. As a result, the surprise was preserved and audiences got to experience the sequence the way the makers intended."

About 'Welcome to the Jungle'

Directed by Ahmed Khan, 'Welcome to the Jungle' boasts one of Bollywood's biggest ensemble casts, featuring Suniel Shetty, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johnny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, and many others. The film is currently playing in theatres nationwide.Also Read: Welcome To The Jungle Movie Review and Release Live Updates: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Paresh Rawal return for another laughter riot

title: Jake Reiner makes first appearance after family tragedy
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Jake Reiner, actor and podcaster, returned to the public eye after the heartbreaking loss of his parents, Rob and Michele, in December 2025. He graced the premiere of Larry David's latest project, 'Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness,' sparking speculation about a potential guest appearance.
content:
Jake Reiner stepped back into the spotlight at the premiere of Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness, marking his first public outing since the loss of his parents in December 2025.Image credit (Jake Reiner Instagram)

Jake Reiner has made his first public appearance since the passing of his parents, Rob and Michele Reiner, in December 2025. The 35-year-old actor and podcaster attended the red carpet premiere of 'Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness' on Tuesday, June 23, marking a significant moment as he works to move forward following the family tragedy.The special event, created by Larry David a longtime close friend of Jake's late parents provided the occasion for Jake's public outing. Jake kept his look understated for the occasion, wearing a black blazer, black pants and a gray T-shirt as he navigated the red carpet with photographers and media present.

Jake Reiner's appearance at the premiere

Following the premiere, Jake took to Instagram to share details of his attendance at the event. He posted photographs from the red carpet and hinted at his involvement with the comedy series itself.

"Attended the premiere of Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness this week. Comes out Friday on @hbo @hbomax, look out for me in the first episode ," he wrote alongside the images, suggesting that viewers may see him make an appearance in the inaugural episode of the programme.

The December 2025 tragedy and its aftermath

According to PEOPLE, Jake's parents, Rob Reiner (78) and Michele Reiner (70), were found deceased in their Brentwood, California home in December 2025.

The circumstances surrounding their passing have become the subject of significant legal proceedings. Jake's younger brother Nicholas, 32, was arrested approximately six hours after the discovery and has been charged with two counts of first-degree murder in connection with their deaths.Nicholas has maintained a plea of not guilty to the charges. The Los Angeles County District Attorney has pursued the case with a designation of "special circumstances," a legal classification that could potentially make Nicholas eligible for either the death penalty or life imprisonment without the possibility of parole.

The Reiner family also includes Jake's sister Romy, 28, and his older half-sister Tracey, 61, whom Rob shares with his first wife, the late Penny Marshall.

The actor and podcaster has remained largely private as he processes the tragedy that changed his family forever.Image credit (Jake Reiner Instagram)

Jake Reiner's personal essay reflecting on the tragedy

In April, Jake publicly addressed the tragedy for the first time through a candid personal essay published on Substack. In the piece he detailed the moment he learned of his parents' passing and the emotional devastation that followed.Jake described being at Union Station celebrating the life of one of his closest friends who had passed away the previous October when he received a phone call from his sister informing him that their parents were no longer living.

He reflected on the profound shock of that moment and the journey that followed."The 45-minute Lyft ride from downtown to the west side was unendurable. My world, as I knew it, had collapsed. I was in a trance," he wrote. "The only thing I could focus on was that I needed to get to my childhood home. I needed to get to my sister. I needed to figure out what the hell just happened."

Through personal reflections and public appearances, Jake Reiner has shared the difficult reality of coping with profound loss.Image credit (Jake Reiner Instagram)

Jake Reiner on what was lost

In his essay, Jake grappled with the reality of his dual loss and the milestones his parents would not witness.

He expressed the complex emotions that arose from suddenly losing both parents simultaneously."I feel I was robbed of so many things that day. My parents won't be at my wedding, they won't get to hold their future grandchild, and they won't get to see me have the successful career I'm still seeking," he wrote. "It simultaneously breaks my heart and enrages me."Jake emphasised the incomprehensible nature of his grief, describing the daily struggle to accept the reality of his circumstances."

Nothing can prepare you for what it feels like to lose both parents instantly at the same time. It's too devastating to comprehend. I still wake up every morning having to convince myself that, no, it's not a dream. This truly is my living nightmare," he continued.

Jake Reiner's tribute to his parents

Despite the trauma surrounding their passing, Jake spoke warmly of his parents and the values they instilled in him. He described them as central figures in his life and as examples of how to live with generosity and integrity."They are my guiding lights, the foundation of who I am as a human being, and the most giving people I have ever known," Jake wrote. "A lot of people don't have the luxury of having the best parents, the best mom, or the best dad, but I did. The love they have for me, my brother, and my sister is truly unconditional. And the love they have for each other in their marriage is something I always looked up to as the standard of what a successful relationship looks like," Jake stated.

title: Darshan's wife dismisses son Vineesh accident rumours
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Vijayalakshmi Darshan, wife of jailed Kannada superstar Darshan Thoogudeepa, issued a detailed statement dismissing viral social media rumours claiming their son, Vineesh, was hospitalised following a major car accident in Bengaluru. Clarifying the incident in Rajarajeshwari Nagar involving their Fo
content:
Darshan Thoogudeepa's wife dismisses son Vineesh accident rumours; Says, He was not driving the vehicle'

Vijayalakshmi Darshan, wife of jailed Kannada superstar Darshan Thoogudeepa, issued a detailed statement dismissing viral social media rumours claiming their son, Vineesh, was hospitalised following a major car accident in Bengaluru.

Clarifying the incident in Rajarajeshwari Nagar involving their Ford Endeavour, Vijayalakshmi confirmed that Vineesh is entirely safe, was not behind the wheel, and merely stepped out to check on a two-wheeler after a minor traffic collision. With the family already under intense public scrutiny, Bengaluru Police have also stepped in to confirm that no official case or complaint has been registered regarding the minor road mishap.

Minor road incident sparked rumours

The speculation reportedly began after a minor collision involving a Ford Endeavour associated with Vineesh was reported in Bengaluru. The vehicle was said to have been involved in a minor road incident with a two-wheeler. As videos and claims related to the incident spread online, confusion grew over Vineesh's role in the accident.

Vijayalakshmi Darshan shares detailed statement

According to TOI City reports, Darshan's wife, Vijayalakshmi Darshan, released a detailed statement.

She clarified in the statement that Vineesh was neither injured nor driving the vehicle when the accident happened.She said, "We would like to clarify that the news being circulated by certain media outlets claiming that Vinish met with an accident and has been hospitalized is completely false. Vinish is absolutely safe and doing well. He was not driving the vehicle; as is usually the case, our driver was behind the wheel.

A minor road incident occurred, which, unfortunately, is not uncommon in Bengaluru traffic. The other party involved acknowledged that it was their mistake and even apologized.

Vinish merely stepped out of the vehicle to ensure that the people on the bike were safe. Unfortunately those few moments have been taken out of context and presented in a completely misleading manner."Darshan's wife added, "As a family we are already going through a difficult time, and the spread of such unverified and sensationalized news only adds to our pain and anxiety.

We sincerely request everyone, especially media organizations, to verify facts before publishing or broadcasting information that can cause unnecessary distress to individuals and their families. We also request everyone not to believe or share these false reports.

"

Police confirm no case has been registered

As reported by Money Control, police have stated that no case has been registered in connection with the reported road incident.On the professional front, Darshan Thoogudeepa was last seen in 'The Devil: The Hero' which is a Kannada political action thriller directed by Prakash Veer.

title: Actress Ann Blyth passes away at 98
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: The film world mourns the loss of Ann Blyth, a legendary actress celebrated for her unforgettable roles in 'Mildred Pierce' and 'The World In His Arms,' who died at 98. Blyth's illustrious career began with child performances and saw her receive an Oscar nomination at 16. Beyond her artistic achieve
content:
Veteran star Ann Blythe passed away at the age of 98 due to natural causes.

Trigger warning: This article mentions death, reader discretion is advised.Ann Blyth, who was best known for her work in ‘Mildred Pierce’, as well as ‘The World In His Arms’ and ‘Mr.

Peabody and the Mermaid,’ has passed away. She was 98.

Ann Blyth passes away at 98

The famed actress and singer passed away on Wednesday, as confirmed by KABC’s George Pennachio. He took to his Facebook account in order to share a tribute post for the veteran star, sharing how much of an influential figure she was in the industry. He wrote, “She was only 16 when she was nominated for an Oscar! Actress Ann Blyth died peacefully of natural causes on Wednesday at the age of 98, less than two months before her 99th birthday.

”He further detailed her career in his post, sharing how she was one of the youngest successful stars of her time, and had even dabbled a little in every stream of media, including radio and Broadway. He also added, “Ann was active in philanthropy and volunteered for many causes. Her family says she loved her garden, knitting, and oil painting. She was known for gifting her work to friends and family.” He also made mention of how often Blyth would return responses to fans' mail, and that she loved interacting with people.

All about Ann Blyth and her career

Blyth was only 6 years old when she first started working in the entertainment industry, and slowly rose to the top in the golden age of cinema. She started as a child performer at a radio station. She later moved on to Broadway after appearing on stage for the first time in ‘Watch on the Rhine’ in 1941. 3 years later, in 1944, she finally landed her film debut and appeared on the big screen in ‘Chip Off the Old Block.’Over the years, she worked with a lot of big stars and became a rising force on her own as well.

Her most notable work, which she is still remembered for today, comes from ‘Mildred Pierce.’ The actress played Joan Crawford’s daughter in the film and even earned an Oscar nomination for her portrayal.She is remembered for many notable films, including ‘Brute Force’, ‘The Great Caruso’, ‘The Helen Morgan Story’, ‘The Student Prince’, and many others. Her last appearance in front of the camera was in the TV series, ‘Murder, She Wrote’, in 1985. She was also honoured with the Living Legacy Award in 2003 by the Women's International Center for her work and her influence.

title: Welcome to Jungle Twitter review: Netizens hail Akshay starrer
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Akshay Kumar's long-awaited comedy Welcome to the Jungle, directed by Ahmed Khan, finally hit theatres on June 26. The ensemble entertainer, featuring a cast of nearly 30 actors, triggered a flood of reactions on social media following its premiere shows, with a majority of viewers giving it a thumb
content:
'Welcome to Jungle' Twitter review: Netizens hail Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty starrer; call it 'brain rot family entertainer'

Akshay Kumar's long-awaited comedy Welcome to the Jungle, directed by Ahmed Khan, finally hit theatres on June 26. The ensemble entertainer, featuring a cast of nearly 30 actors, triggered a flood of reactions on social media following its premiere shows, with a majority of viewers giving it a thumbs up.

'Welcome to the Jungle' X (Twitter) review

Moviegoers who caught the premiere shows took to X (formerly Twitter) to share their first impressions, and the response has been largely warm. A majority of viewers called the film a complete "paisa vasool" entertainer, with many praising its non-stop humour and over-the-top comedy. The film appears to have connected well with audiences in the mood for a light-hearted, no-frills Bollywood masala experience.

A person posted, "WHAT AN ENTERTAINER #WelcometotheJungle.

@akshaykumar maan gye sethji No one comes close to Akki when it comes to comedy. Special mention to Rajpal/Paresh/Suniel/Arshad for being so damn funny throughout. 2nd half could have been slightly more engaging 😂😂😂😂/5. Chalegi 100%."Another one added, "#Welcome3 Is A Decent Entertainer With Brainrot Moments,So Don't Use Too Much Logic. Some Scenes Work, Some Fall Flat. The Editing Hurts The Film But As Usual #AkshayKumar Excels In His Fav.

Genre. Overall It's A Decent Timepass Entertainer."An X user wrote, "I think #WelcomeToTheJungle is going to be big hit. The first half is insanely funny and 2nd half despite having a crap story, it still does have some good humour. Average comedy movies go on to do well and this one is a very good comedy film. Expecting 250cr+ final going bullish."One expressed, "Family Entertainer Hai. #WelcomeToTheJungle Go and watch with your best ones.

Akshay Kumar best as always with supporting cast."A post read, "#WelcomeToTheJungle first half is a complete entertainer. The comedy works, the energy never drops, and the big cast is used well enough to keep things fun. It has that classic madcap really enjoyed the ride so far looking forward to what the second half has in store."

Does 'Welcome to the Jungle' have any weaknesses?

Not all viewers, however, came away fully satisfied. Some criticised the film for being excessively stretched, with a few finding certain characters and sequences difficult to sit through.

The mixed voices suggest the film works best for those going in purely for entertainment rather than substance.

About 'Welcome to the Jungle'

The film stars Akshay Kumar alongside Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johnny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, and many others. 'Welcome to the Jungle' has been released in theatres on June 26, 2026.Also Read: Welcome To The Jungle Movie Review and Release Live Updates: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Paresh Rawal return for another laughter riotAlso Read: Akshay Kumar: What happens right after the intermission in 'Welcome to the Jungle'? Inside Akshay Kumar’s hilarious, hidden post-interval scene

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay showcases impressive fitness at 53
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: On the International Day Against Drug Abuse, Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay turned heads in Chennai not just by flagging off an anti-drug awareness marathon, but by actively running the full 6 km distance. Proving his exceptional fitness at 53, the 'Jana Nayagan' star led thousands of participants,
content:
On the International Day Against Drug Abuse, Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay turned heads in Chennai not just by flagging off an anti-drug awareness marathon, but by actively running the full 6 km distance.

Proving his exceptional fitness at 53, the 'Jana Nayagan' star led thousands of participants, including ministers and volunteers, under the theme 'Start Run, Stop Drugs'. Videos of the Chief Minister effortlessly completing the run and motivating fellow contestants have quickly gone viral, earning widespread praise for his discipline and hands-on leadership style.

Marathon sees huge public participation

The anti-drug awareness marathon was organised under the theme 'Start Run, Stop Drugs' in Chennai. Before the run began, Vijay administered an anti-drug pledge, which thousands of participants gathered at the venue repeated.

The participation of ministers, government officials, volunteers, and young people transformed the program into an awareness event. Vijay completed the full distance of 6 km while motivating other runners in the marathon.

Vijay's fitness and sporting spirit win appreciation

One of the more talked-about moments was Vijay being spotted cheering the contestants during the run. Even during the course of his marathon run, he stopped for a moment to offer water to another runner.

The Chief Minister wore a black T-shirt, black track pants, and sunglasses, and he was seen looking calm and confident the whole way through the race. His ability to run the 6 km distance easily impressed many, and those who supported him felt that his strict discipline and fitness regime contributed to this feat.

Marathon videos go viral as supporters celebrate Vijay's active lifestyle

The internet was flooded with videos of the marathon, with many praising Chief Minister Vijay’s stamina and active participation. Observers noted that his involvement sent a powerful message about leading by example. Ultimately, his completion of the 6 km run became a focal point of the anti-drug campaign, as supporters celebrated both his physical fitness and his commitment to raising public awareness.

title: Pitt WINS motion in winery dispute; Jolie's buyers to testify
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Actor Brad Pitt has scored a legal win in his ongoing court battle with former wife Angelina Jolie over the ownership of Chateau Miraval, the French winery the couple once owned together, PEOPLE magazine said.
content:
Brad Pitt has secured a legal victory in his ongoing dispute over the ownership and sale of the French winery Chateau Miraval, which he co-owned with ex-wife Angelina Jolie.According to a June 17 court filing obtained by PEOPLE, the Superior Court of California granted a motion filed by Pitt's legal team seeking to compel depositions from members of the Stoli Group.

Pitt's attorneys claimed that the investors associated with the company, had firsthand knowledge of Jolie's 2021 sale of her stake in Chateau Miraval to Tenute del Mondo.

Court sets date for deposition

New court documents filed in June state that depositions of Oliynik, along with the "persons most qualified" from Tenute del Mondo B.V. and Nouvel LLC - the company Jolie, sold to Tenute del Mondo - must take place in London by Sept. 30.On June 24, California's Court of Appeal reversed an earlier decision concerning Yuri Shefler's involvement in the Chateau Miraval transaction.

As per People, the court, in its ruling, rejected Shefler's assertion that he had only a 'minimal role' in the sale. It stated, "It defies credulity that Shefler, a sophisticated businessman, would risk almost USD 40 million on a transaction about which he knew nothing and with which he had no involvement.

"A hearing on Pitt's motion to compel depositions of members of the Stoli group including Alexey Oliynik, to testify about the sale, is scheduled for July 8.

Brad Pitt's legal team on sale of winery

The Stoli Group is led by Yuri Shefler, a Russian-born billionaire based in Switzerland. In 2023, Pitt sued Jolie, seeking damages over the sale of her interest in the winery to what his legal filings described as Shefler's "Russia-affiliated spirits conglomerate."Pitt's legal team also argued that the Stoli Group "has been the subject of repeated boycotts in connection with Vladimir Putin's invasion of Ukraine and homophobic legislative Agenda."

The filings further alleged that Jolie's sale "jeopardises the reputation of the business that Pitt so carefully built."Previously, Pitt had tried to depose Stoli Group executive Alexey Oliynik, who reportedly refused to provide documents or appear for questioning, saying he could not be forced to do so because he lives in Switzerland.

Brad Pitt's team reacts to court ruling

A source close to Pitt told PEOPLE, "This win is another step towards transparency over what took place."

The source also claimed that Shefler "was a partner [Jolie] chose knowing it was a partner Brad did not want involved in the business."Another source close to Pitt claimed that Jolie had agreed Pitt would have the "first right of refusal" before any sale but later sold her stake to Shefler.

Angelina Jolie's Lawyer reacts

Responding to the recent court rulings, a lawyer for Jolie told PEOPLE that the decisions "have no impact on the merits of the case, and certainly has no impact on Ms.

Jolie's case. At this point, Ms. Jolie is just looking forward to defeating the case at trial next year so that their family can finally focus their energies on healing and moving on."A source close to Jolie also said she sold her share to Stoli because she believed the company would help grow the business for the benefit of their children, who are expected to inherit Pitt's share in the future. The source added, "The truth is that Pitt's ego and obsession for control got in the way.

Brad refused to work with Stoli simply because Angie chose them, not him."

About Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie's battle over Chateau Miraval

Pitt and Jolie's legal fight over Chateau Miraval began in February 2022 after Pitt alleged that Jolie sold her share of the winery without his approval, despite an agreement that neither would sell without the other's consent. Jolie later filed a countersuit, accusing Pitt of waging a "vindictive war" against her after she filed for divorce in 2016. The couple finalised their divorce settlement in December 2024.

title: Prabhas' gesture sparks fresh Baahubali 3 buzz
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: A recent documentary, 'Baahubali: The Torchbearer,' has ignited speculation about a potential 'Baahubali 3.' A clip featuring Prabhas, Rana Daggubati, and Anushka Shetty, where Rana hints at the world not being ready yet for another installment, has gone viral. Fans are interpreting Prabhas's gestur
content:
Picture Credit: X

SS Rajamouli’s ‘Baahubali’ franchise remains a landmark film in the Indian cinema industry. Recently the makers dropped the documentary ‘Baahubali: The Torchbearer,’ which gives fans a look into the film’s making. Interestingly, there is a buzz regarding the film’s much awaited third part as a clip from the show including Prabhas, Rana Daggubati and

Anushka Shetty

appears to hint that another film in the popular franchise could happen in the future.In the viral clip, Rana says, "The world may not be ready yet, but there will be Baahubali..." As soon as he says this, Prabhas smiles and raises three fingers. The moment makes everyone on the couch laugh, including Anushka Shetty. The clip ends with the words, "And the legacy continues!"

Watch the clip

The video quickly spread across social media, with many fans treating it as confirmation that ‘Baahubali 3’ is finally on the way.

However, there has been no official announcement from the makers so far.

Fans believe part 3 is coming

An internet user sharing the clip on X (formerly Twitter) wrote, “The wait is over! Baahubali 3 is OFFICIALLY confirmed by Rana Daggubati.” Another user added, “There is no doubt that Baahubali changed the face of Indian cinema forever. It set new standards in storytelling, scale, visuals, and box office success. Now, with Baahubali 3, expectations are bigger than ever.”

About ‘Baahubali: The Torchbearer’

‘Baahubali: The Torchbearer’ premiered on Netflix on June 26. The four-episode documentary shows how the films were made and how they became a global success. It includes behind-the-scenes footage, interviews with the cast and unseen moments from the sets.

About ‘Baahubali’

Directed by SS Rajamouli, the Baahubali films starred Prabhas, Rana Daggubati, Anushka Shetty, Tamannaah Bhatia, Ramya Krishnan and Nasser in lead roles. Released in 2015 and 2017, the two films became one of the biggest franchises in Indian cinema and made Prabhas a pan-India star.Last year, as part of the franchise's 10-year celebrations, ‘Baahubali: The Epic’ which is a remastered version that combined both films into one and was released in theatres on October 31, 2025. It was later released on OTT.

title: King Charles III offers stay option to Prince Harry and family
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle have reportedly 'not yet responded' to an offer from King Charles III regarding accommodation for their upcoming visit to the United Kingdom. According to reports, the couple are expected to return to Britain in July for the first time in four years, bringing their chi
content:
As plans for their first family visit to Britain in years take shape, Prince Harry and Meghan Markle continue balancing reconciliation efforts with ongoing royal tensions.Image credit (Instagram)

Prince Harry and Meghan Markle have reportedly 'not yet responded' to an offer from King Charles III regarding accommodation for their upcoming visit to the United Kingdom. According to reports, the couple are expected to return to Britain in July for the first time in four years, bringing their children, Prince Archie, and Princess Lilibet, for the "One Year To Go" ceremony marking the countdown to the 2027 Invictus Games in Birmingham.As per GB News, the return trip has long been complicated by significant logistical and security concerns. Prince Harry lost his automatic entitlement to 24-hour armed police protection in 2020 following his and Meghan's withdrawal from formal royal duties. He subsequently challenged this decision, arguing that the British Home Office acted unlawfully, but ultimately failed.

The security question that nearly prevented the visit

The security issue became so significant that Harry expressed serious reservations about the possibility of returning to Britain with his family.

Speaking to the BBC following his court loss, the Duke of Sussex stated plainly, "I can't see a world in which I would bring my wife and children back to the UK at this point."

While King Charles III is said to welcome contact with Prince Harry, Prince William's reportedly firm stance leaves the prospect of reconciliation uncertain.Image credit (Instagram)

However, recent reports suggest that adequate security measures have now been confirmed for the Sussexes' upcoming visit, removing what had appeared to be a major barrier to their return. This development has allowed planning to proceed toward the next crucial question - where the family would stay during their time in the country.

Multiple royal residences reportedly offered

King Charles III has reportedly extended an offer of royal accommodation to Harry and Meghan. Several prominent royal properties have been considered as potential venues for their visit. Buckingham Palace St James's Palace, Windsor Castle and Frogmore Cottage the couple's former residence before their relocation to California in 2020 have all reportedly been discussed as possibilities.However, according to the Daily Mail, Harry and Meghan have not yet formally responded to this offer.

Althorp House emerges as likely destination

The couple has reportedly been tipped to potentially stay at Althorp House, the ancestral estate of the Spencer family and the childhood home of Diana, Princess of Wales. The property holds profound personal significance for Harry as it serves as the resting place of his late mother. Geographically, the estate's location, approximately an hour's drive from Birmingham, makes it a logical choice given Harry's primary reason for visiting Britain.

With King Charles III reportedly open to rebuilding bridges, questions remain over whether the wider royal family can move past years of public division.Image credit (Instagram)

The website for Althorp House notes that the property will 'be closed to general visitors on July 10 and 11', a detail that has prompted speculation among royal observers about the couple's potential visit. According to Hello! magazine, the residence has been offered to Harry and Meghan as an accommodation option, though the couple have similarly not yet decided whether to accept this arrangement.

Decisions expected soon

While final decisions regarding both accommodation and security arrangements remain pending, sources indicate that clarity on these matters is expected in the coming weeks.

The couple's commitment to attending the Invictus Games countdown event suggests their visit will proceed, pending resolution of these logistical questions.

King Charles III anticipating the reunion

Despite the complexities surrounding the visit, King Charles III is reportedly looking forward to reuniting with his younger son and his grandchildren. The King's apparent openness to facilitating this visit contrasts sharply with the position being taken by other members of the royal family.

The King's reported accommodation offer reflects his desire to spend time with Prince Harry, Prince Archie and Princess Lilibet during their expected UK visit.Image credit (Instagram)

Prince William maintains firm boundaries

Prince William, however, appears increasingly unlikely to facilitate any reconciliation with his estranged brother during the visit. Speaking to GB News last week, royal commentator Richard Fitzwilliams said that the Prince of Wales remains "deeply betrayed" by Harry's actions and is "unlikely" to meet with him during the Sussexes' time in Britain.This stance has significant implications for Prince Archie and Princess Lilibet's potential interactions with their cousins. A meeting between the younger royals - Prince George, 12, Princess Charlotte, 11, and Prince Louis, 8 - appears to be effectively off the table, given Prince William's position on maintaining distance from his brother and sister-in-law.

title: Priyanka: 'Wanted more work which had me as a lead'
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Priyanka Chopra shared insights into her Hollywood journey, emphasizing authenticity and evolution to maintain audience attention. She revealed that embracing mistakes and accepting imperfections has fostered a stronger emotional connection with fans. Chopra also spoke about her ambition, how reject
content:
Priyanka Chopra, who is in the middle of SS Rajamouli's 'Varanasi' film shoot and gearing up to begin work on her next, made waves with her candid discussion on her journey in Hollywood.The actress, was a speaker on the Cannes Lions panel, sat down for a chat, where she spoke about her ambitions to make it big in Hollywood and her willingness to create her own opportunities.

Priyanka Chopra on creating opportunities

Speaking to PEOPLE, Chopra said, "I always want to be authentic to myself in everything I do, but keeping people's attention is a really tough job, and you can only do it through evolution," Chopra said.

Addressing her hits and misses along the way, she said, "I can make mistakes, I'm human, I don't get everything right. [When I started my career], I was constantly striving for perfection. But over time, I realized that emotional connection [to fans] came from saying, 'I made a mistake' ...

and I think that's okay. That emotional connection with your audience comes from being able to accept that I'm doing my best."

Priyanka Chopra on her career ambitions

Chopra also admitted that rejection has often fuelled her determination to make it big in the film industry. "I'm very ambitious, and if I'm said no to, I want to do it even more," she said. "I've heard this from so many female colleagues: When you want to move along, and there's a glass ceiling that's been set for most women in entertainment, you just have to do it yourself," she added.

Priyanka Chopra on starting Hollywood production company

Priyanka also shared the reason behind venturing into production and playing the lead in films she backs. She said, "When I came to America, I wanted more work, which had me as a lead, which had me doing parts that I don't think a lot of studios imagined an Indian actor doing. So I started producing my own movies."The actress also reflected on her own struggle and shared her motivation to start a production house. She revealed, "When I came into the film industry, I didn't know anyone ... when new people come into film and TV, that is my sweet spot. I want to, as a production house, to be the shoulders for entertainers and creators to jump off, because I created a platform and I know how hard it is."

Priyanka Chopra's upcoming films

After wrapping up work on 'Varanasi', Priyanka will shift focus to her next producing 'Reset' that will also see her playing the lead opposite Orlando Bloom. The film that is said to be a survival thriller, is slated to go on floors in August.

title: Prince William's "bolted shut" approach to Prince Harry revealed
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Prince William has reportedly drawn a clear line regarding his interactions with Prince Harry and Meghan Markle ahead of their upcoming visit to the United Kingdom. According to royal commentator Dan Wakeford, the future king will only be in the presence of the Duke and Duchess of Sussex during form
content:
The Duke and Duchess of Sussex continue to attract attention as discussions around their relationship with the royal family and future visits to Britain resurface.Image credit (Instagram)

Prince William has reportedly drawn a clear line regarding his interactions with Prince Harry and Meghan Markle ahead of their upcoming visit to the United Kingdom. According to royal commentator Dan Wakeford, the future king will only be in the presence of the Duke and Duchess of Sussex during formal, publicly scheduled events.Speaking to Fox News Digital, Wakeford outlined the stark difference in approach between Prince William and King Charles III regarding their younger family members. While reports suggest that King Charles will spend time with Harry, Meghan and their two children during the summer visit, Prince William appears to have taken a distinctly different stance on family reconciliation.

Prince William's firm boundaries toward Prince Harry and Meghan Markle

Wakeford described the current state of William's household with particularly telling language.

"The Wales household is completely bolted shut right now," the expert told the outlet, emphasizing the closed nature of William and Kate's family unit.When asked about the likelihood of William arranging a private meeting with Harry and Meghan, Wakeford was unequivocal. "[William's] stance has not changed and they would not arrange to see Harry and Meghan outside an official public engagement," he said. "I don't even think that is going to happen."

Speculation surrounding the Sussexes' upcoming trip to Britain has renewed conversations about their ties with the monarchy and the possibility of rebuilding relationships.Image credit (Instagram)

"That's a much firmer line than Charles' side of the street" he went on explain.

Wakeford offered further insight into the potential trajectory of Harry and Meghan's future visits to Britain. "Whether it becomes the first of many trips, which is the phrase being used around this, depends entirely on how Charles handles it and whether William keeps his distance," he continued. "William's position is hardened just as much as ever and it seems permanent."

The fundamental shift in Prince Harry and Prince William's relationship

According to sources, the relationship between the two brothers has undergone a fundamental change that may not be reversible.

Rob Shuter's Naughty But Nice Substack reported that William attributes this shift largely to Harry and Meghan's public statements about the royal family following their departure from formal royal duties in 2020."William believes the relationship has fundamentally changed," a source told the outlet. "He's moved on emotionally and that's very hard to reverse," the insider noted, suggesting that William has made a deliberate emotional decision to distance himself from his younger brother rather than attempting reconciliation.

While reports suggest the Duke of Sussex remains open to repairing family bonds, questions continue over whether meaningful progress can be made in the near future.Image credit (Instagram)

Prince William's resistance to forgiveness and reconciliation

Despite Harry's reported reconciliation with King Charles, sources close to Prince William suggest that the heir to the throne remains unmoved by any potential gesture toward healing the family breach. Heat World reported comments from an insider close to the Prince of Wales that paint a picture of someone who feels profoundly betrayed and has little interest in moving past those feelings."William is still livid and says even if he wanted to forgive his brother, letting him in would send the wrong message to the public," an insider told the outlet.

"He's the least bit tempted to anyway, he still feels completely betrayed and has no interest in pretending everything is fine just for appearances."The source continued to describe William's perspective on the damage inflicted by Harry and Meghan's public statements and their departure from royal duties. "He is sick and tired of reminding people that they've inflicted so much grief and stress on the family" the insider alleged.

title: SRK shares story behind famous childhood pic - WATCH
author: TOI Entertainment Desk
excerpt: Bollywood superstar Shah Rukh Khan charmed Mangaluru on June 25, sharing cherished childhood memories, including a famous photo of himself in a bucket. He expressed gratitude for the city's immense warmth and love. Khan also thrilled fans with energetic dance performances. His visit coincides with t
content:
Shah Rukh Khan received a warm welcome in Mangalore as he attended a special event on June 25. At the event, the Bollywood superstar got candid with fans about his life, journey in the film industry and also delighted many by sharing the story behind one of his most well-known childhood photographs.Speaking to the cheering crowd, Shah Rukh pulled out the iconic picture, which shows him as a toddler sitting in a bucket, with his hair spiked up and soap on his cheek. Opening up about the story behind the cute picture, he shared, "As inappropriate as it may seem just now, because my poor boy is without clothes. This is the only picture I have from my childhood, which is in Mangalore, without clothes in a bucket."

Shah Rukh Khan reveals story behing childhood pic

Shah Rukh Khan wooes fans in Mangalore

The actor, who made his big-screen debut in director Raj Kanwar's 1992 romantic drama 'Deewana', was also seen taking over the stage and performing some epic dance numbers for his adoring fans.

Videos and photographs from the event went viral on social media, with fans swooning over the actor and his heartwarming interaction.

One such clip saw Shah Rukh greeting fans in Kannada before thanking them for the enthusiastic reception. "Thank you, Mangalore! First of all, when I was coming here, I didn't know what to expect. But the warmth, love, goodness and excitement, right from the airport to the drive down here, amidst all you people, felt great."

Shah Rukh Khan takes a break from 'King' shoot

Although Shah Rukh was born in New Delhi in 1965, he spent his early childhood in Mangalore. The actor and his family reportedly resided there until he was around five years old.SRK's visit comes amid his 'King' shoot. The actor will be seen in an all-new avatar, for the action-thriller, that will see him sharing the screen with daughter Suhana Khan for the first time. The film will also see him teaming up with an ensemble cast of Deepika Padukone, Abhishek Bachchan, Rani Mukerji and many more.The movie that is said to be in the final leg of shoots and post-production, will hit the big screen on December 24.

title: Superfast ticketing - Indian Railways's new reservation system
author: Unknown

title: Disclosure Day North America Box Office: Witnesses Sharp Drop On 2nd Wednesday – Can It Surpass The $100 Million Mark?
author: Pranshu Awasthi
excerpt:
Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day has witnessed a sharp drop on the second Wednesday at the domestic box office. Can it cross the $100 million milestone?
The post Disclosure Day North America Box Office: Witnesses Sharp Drop On 2nd Wednesday – Can It Surpass The $100 Million Mark? appeared first on
content:
After its release on June 12, 2026, Steven Spielberg’s Disclosure Day is on the verge of completing two weeks in theaters. The legendary filmmaker has previously delivered several iconic films and multiple blockbusters over his illustrious career. Within the sci-fi genre, he has directed hit films like Close Encounters of the Third Kind (1977), E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial (1982), Jurassic Park (1993), Minority Report (2002), and War of the Worlds (2005). Given his tryst with the sci-fi genre, industry observers were eager to see how his next film, Disclosure Day, would perform at the box office.

A Sharp Second Wednesday Drop 

The film received positive reviews from critics and earned $44.5 million across 3,824 North American locations in its opening weekend. Recently, it added $1.6 million on Wednesday (June 24), a 35.5% drop from Tuesday Discount Day and a sharp 58.5% drop from last Wednesday. With a current $84.9 million domestic haul, Disclosure Day has yet to crack the top ten highest-grossing films of 2026 at the domestic box office. In comparison, Steven Spielberg’s last film, Ready Player One, opened to $41.8 million and went on to gross $137.7 million in North America.

Now, the question is: Can Disclosure Day cross the $100 million mark at the domestic box office? Let’s break down the numbers.

Disclosure Day – Box Office Summary

  • North America: $84.9 million
  • International: $87.8 million
  • Worldwide: $172.7 million

Trending

What The Numbers Indicate

As of now, the Emily Blunt starrer needs to earn another $15.1 million in North America to reach the $100 million milestone. At its current pace, the sci-fi film is well-positioned to close this gap during its ongoing run. In fact, if it manages to deliver steady weekday and weekend holds, it can potentially reach the $120 million figure at the North American box office. However, the final box office verdict will become clear as it continues its theatrical run.

Can Disclosure Day Outgross Ready Player One?

Steven Spielberg’s last sci-fi film was the 2018 hit Ready Player One, which earned $137.7 million in North America. This means for Disclosure Day to outgross the 2018 film, it must earn an additional $52.8 million domestically. At the time of writing, closing this gap appears to be a challenging target, and Steven Spielberg’s latest film must demonstrate strong holds in the coming weeks and overcome competition from Toy Story 5 and Obsession to surpass that figure. The final outcome will become clear in the coming weeks.

What’s Disclosure Day All About?

While the story is largely under wraps, the film reportedly follows a small-town meteorologist (played by Emily Blunt) whose ordinary life is turned upside down after clear evidence of extraterrestrial life is discovered. As panic and uncertainty spread, humanity is forced to confront the unsettling truth that it is not alone. The film also features Josh O’Connor, Colin Firth, Eve Hewson, and Colman Domingo.

Disclosure Day Trailer

title: Invincible Season 6 Update: Expected Release Window, Plot Details & Everything We Know About Mark Grayson’s Future
author: Aaradhya Arora
excerpt:
Invincible Season 6 has been officially confirmed by Prime Video. Here’s everything we know about the expected release window, plot details, returning cast, Jack Quaid’s new role, and what’s next for Mark Grayson.
The post Invincible Season 6 Update: Expected Release Window, Plot Details & Everythin
content:
Fans of Invincible have reason to celebrate as Prime Video has officially renewed the hit animated superhero series for a sixth season, even before Season 5 has premiered. The announcement was made by creator Robert Kirkman during the Annecy International Animation Festival, confirming that Mark Grayson’s story is far from over.

Why Prime Video Renewed Invincible For Season 6 Before Season 5 Releases

Based on the acclaimed comic book series created by Robert Kirkman, Cory Walker, and Ryan Ottley, Invincible follows teenager Mark Grayson as he learns to become a superhero under the shadow of his father, Omni-Man, according to Deadline. The early renewal reflects Prime Video’s confidence in the series and its growing popularity worldwide. 

Invincible Season 6 Plot: What Could Happen Next for Mark Grayson?

Prime Video has not revealed any major storyline for season 6. The decision not to share the details is likely to avoid the spoilers for Season 5. With dozens of comic-book storylines still left to adapt, viewers can expect bigger threats, tougher choices, and further character development for Mark Grayson.

Trending

Jack Quaid’s Invincible Character Explained

One of the biggest announcements accompanying the renewal was the addition of Jack Quaid to the voice cast. Quaid will voice Gravitator, also known as Chris, a gifted engineer who initially uses his talents for criminal activities before an encounter with Invincible changes his path.

Invincible Season 4 Ratings and Global Success Explained

The renewal follows a strong performance from Season 4, which reportedly became the most-watched season in the show’s history. According to Skybound Entertainment, the series quickly won viewers’ attention, helping it reach the Top 10 in more than 50 territories and continuing to generate massive engagement across social media platforms. It also holds a perfect 100% critics’ score on Rotten Tomatoes, with an audience score of 87%. 

Invincible Season 6 Release Date Predictions and Expected Window

Although Season 6 does not have an official release date, Season 5 is currently expected to premiere in 2027. 

If Prime Video maintains its recent annual release schedule, Season 6 could arrive in 2028. The early renewal may help ensure a smoother production timeline and prevent long delays between seasons.

Invincible Cast: Who Is Returning for Season 6?

The series is expected to continue featuring Steven Yeun as Mark Grayson, Sandra Oh as Debbie Grayson, and J.K. Simmons as Nolan Grayson/Omni-Man. Additional casting announcements are likely to be revealed closer to Season 5’s release.

What Invincible Season 6 Means for the Future Of The Franchise?

With Season 6 officially confirmed, Prime Video has finally indicated its long-term commitment to the superhero drama. The renewal ensures that Mark Grayson’s journey will continue beyond Season 5, giving fans even more chances to witness action, emotional storytelling, and comic-book adaptations that have made Invincible one of the platform’s biggest animated hits and won hearts worldwide.

title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day: Confirmed & Rumored Villains – But Who’s The Secret Main Antagonist?
author: Pranshu Awasthi
excerpt:
Here is a list of confirmed and rumored villains in Tom Holland’s Spider-Man: Brand New Day. But who is the secret main antagonist?
The post Spider-Man: Brand New Day: Confirmed & Rumored Villains – But Who’s The Secret Main Antagonist? appeared first on Koimoi.
content:
The last solo Spider-Man movie starring Tom Holland was the 2021 installment, Spider-Man: No Way Home. That film received a stellar 93% critics’ score and a near-perfect 97% audience score on Rotten Tomatoes. At the box office, it grossed a massive $1.921 billion worldwide and ranks as the third-highest-grossing superhero movie of all time. Given the strong buzz around the sequel, Spider-Man: Brand New Day is certainly among the most anticipated upcoming films of 2026. It is set to hit the big screen on July 31.

Thanks to its multiversal theme, Spider-Man: No Way Home featured multiple major villains, including Green Goblin, Doctor Octopus, Electro, Sandman, and Lizard. With the stakes now higher than ever, let’s take a look at the confirmed and rumored villains that are set to feature in Spider-Man: Brand New Day. Let’s also delve into the big question: Who could be the secret main antagonist in the film?

Confirmed & Rumored Villains In Spider-Man: Brand New Day

1. Scorpion

Mac Gargan, aka Scorpion (played by Michael Mando), first appeared in Spider-Man: Homecoming (2017). In that film, Spider-Man captured him and sent him to prison. The Brand New Day trailer suggests that Scorpion has escaped custody and is set to clash with Spider-Man once again.

Trending

2. The Hand

In the film’s trailer, Spider-Man can be seen fighting a bunch of ninja warriors. They are most likely part of a criminal organization called The Hand and one of the film’s villains.

3. Tombstone

Marvin Jones III, who voiced the supervillain Tombstone in the 2018 animated film, Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse, has reprised his role in Brand New Day as well. His character is a crime boss with superhuman strength and other powers.

4. Tarantula

He is expected to be seen in a brief role as a minor villain in Spider-Man: Brand New Day.

5. Boomerang

Boomerang is also expected to feature as a minor villain in the Tom Holland starrer.

Who Could Be The Main Antagonist?

Although it’s not officially confirmed yet, here are two characters we think could serve as the main antagonist of Spider-Man: Brand New Day.

Sadie Sink’s Mystery Character

Although it’s not confirmed which character Sadie Sink is playing in the film, it is being speculated that she may be playing the powerful mutant Jean Grey. It is also possible that the Stranger Things actress might be playing a different villain or a different character altogether. Her secret role is being kept under wraps by the makers.

Mister Negative

Mister Negative is another powerful supervillain with mind-control powers that appear to align with what is shown in Brand New Day’s trailer, which suggests an unseen force. Perhaps Tom Holland’s Spider-Man is the only one immune to Mister Negative’s manipulative powers.

So, as per the film’s trailer and official logline, it seems either Mister Negative or Sadie Sink’s mystery character could be Spider-Man: Brand New Day’s main villain. This mystery will be unveiled after the film’s release on July 31.

What’s Spider-Man: Brand New Day All About?

The Spider-Man: No Way Home sequel revolves around Peter Parker after the world forgets him due to Doctor Strange’s spell. As he tries to fight criminals, something strange begins to happen to him, and he can’t control it. In such a situation, he must use his powers to save the city and his loved ones from a mysterious, unseen force.

The film also features Zendaya, Sadie Sink, Jacob Batalon, Jon Bernthal, Tramell Tillman, Michael Mando, and Mark Ruffalo in important roles.
